# Digitaliserings- og forvaltningsdepartementet

*13 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Ikrafttredelse | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| [Lov om Digitaliseringsdirektoratets tilgang til taushetsbelagte opplysninger i F](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2023-06-09-29.md) | Lov om Digdirs tilgang til opplysninger i Folkeregisteret | 2023-06-09 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2023-06-09-29.md) |
| [Lov om Norsk Lysingsblad](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1946-10-11-1.md) | Lov om Norsk Lysingsblad | 1948-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1946-10-11-1.md) |
| [Lov om beskyttelse av undersjøiske kabler og rørledninger utenfor sjøterritoriet](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1884-06-14-3.md) | Lov om undersjøiske kabler |  | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1884-06-14-3.md) |
| [Lov om elektronisk kommunikasjon (ekomloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-12-13-76.md) | Ekomloven | 2025-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2024-12-13-76.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i statsansatteloven (fortrinnsrett og rett til fast ansettelse)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-43.md) | Endringslov til statsansatteloven | 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-43.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring av EUs forordning om elektronisk identifikasjon og tillitst](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2018-06-15-44.md) | Lov om elektroniske tillitstjenester | 2018-06-15 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2018-06-15-44.md) |
| [Lov om informasjonsplikt, karantene og saksforbud for politikere, embetsmenn og ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-06-19-70.md) | Karanteneloven | 2016-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2015-06-19-70.md) |
| [Lov om offentlige tjenestetvister [tjenestetvistloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1958-07-18-2.md) | Tjenestetvistloven – tjtvl | 1958-09-05 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1958-07-18-2.md) |
| [Lov om statens ansatte mv. (statsansatteloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-67.md) | Statsansatteloven | 2017-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-67.md) |
| [Lov om statsforetak](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1991-08-30-71.md) | Statsforetaksloven – statsfol | 1992-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1991-08-30-71.md) |
| [Lov om statsføretak (statsføretakslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-04-10-9.md) | Statsføretakslova | 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-04-10-9.md) |
| [Lov om tilrettelegging for utbygging av høyhastighetsnett for elektronisk kommun](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-05-07-40.md) | Bredbåndsutbyggingsloven | 2020-07-01, 2021-10-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2020-05-07-40.md) |
| [Lov om visse sider av elektronisk handel og andre informasjonssamfunnstjenester ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-05-23-35.md) | Ehandelsloven – e-hl | 2003-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2003-05-23-35.md) |
